ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block */,
  "previous_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the previous block */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the block in bytes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the block */,
  "version_hex" INTEGER /* Hexadecimal representation of the version */,
  "version_bits" INTEGER /* Version in bits */,
  "nonce" INTEGER /* Nonce used in the block */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Calculated difficulty of the block */,
  "merkle_root" TEXT /* Merkle root of the block */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions in the block */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fees collected in the block */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward for the block */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Height of the block in the blockchain */,
  "block_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was mined */,
  "block_miner" TEXT /* Miner who mined the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "miners" (
  "miner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each miner */,
  "miner_name" TEXT /* Name of the miner or mining pool */,
  "hash_rate" REAL /* Hash rate of the miner in H/s */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks mined by the miner */,
  "total_rewards" REAL /* Total rewards earned by the miner */,
  "miner_type" TEXT /* Type of miner (e.g., individual, pool) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("miner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee in USD */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., standard, high-priority) */,
  "fee_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "input_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the input transaction */,
  "input_index" INTEGER /* Index of the input in the transaction */,
  "input_amount" REAL /* Amount of the input */,
  "input_amount_usd" REAL /* Amount of the input in USD */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input (e.g., coinbase, transaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "output_address" TEXT /* Address where the output is sent */,
  "output_amount" REAL /* Amount of the output */,
  "output_amount_usd" REAL /* Amount of the output in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "signature" TEXT /* Signature of the witness */,
  "public_key" TEXT /* Public key used by the witness */,
  "witness_type" TEXT /* Type of witness (e.g., signature, ring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats record */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions processed */,
  "total_input" REAL /* Total amount of inputs across all transactions */,
  "total_output" REAL /* Total amount of outputs across all transactions */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fees collected from transactions */,
  "average_fee" REAL /* Average transaction fee */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Block ID where the transactions were included */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_stats_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "health_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, auditor, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who accessed the resource */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., transaction, block, setting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert occurred */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
